description: CAT/EPT temporal double-slit simulation outputs for paper analysis

physics_model.name: Temporal Double-Slit Spectral Diffraction
physics_model.framework: CAT/EPT (Categorical Ambient Thermodynamics / Entropic Production of Time)
physics_model.reference: Tirole et al. temporal double-slit experiment

equations.slit_profile: sigma(t) = A * logistic_rise(t; alpha) * exp(-beta*t) + B * logistic_rise(t-S; alpha) * exp(-beta*(t-S))
equations.visibility_decay_amplitude: V(S) = integral weighted by exp(-gamma * tau_ent(t))

cat_mode_coherence.description: Decoherence on two-slit cross term only

fig2_spectral_series.png.description: Spectral diffraction at 8 separations (200-1400 fs), standard vs CAT/EPT with 4 lambda_ent values

fig2e_period_vs_separation.png.description: Fringe spacing vs slit separation with theoretical 1/S overlay

fig2f_interferogram.png.description: 2D interferogram heatmap (separation x frequency), side-by-side standard vs CAT/EPT

fig_visibility_decay.png.description: V(S) = exp(-lambda_ent * S) decay curves for 6 lambda_ent values

fig_visibility_logV_vs_S.png.description: log(V) vs S linearity check confirming exponential decay

sim05_panelB_lambda_t.png.description: lambda(t) entropic rate at S=800 fs

sim05_panelC_tau_ent_t.png.description: Cumulative tau_ent(t) with |r(t)| overlay at S=800 fs

sim06_panelA_V_vs_rise.png.description: Visibility vs slit rise time (2-40 fs)

sim06_panelB_V_vs_decay.png.description: Visibility vs slit decay time (100-800 fs)

sim06_panelC_fringe_vs_rise.png.description: Fringe spacing vs slit rise time

sim08_panelA_vg_vs_wavelength.png.description: Group velocity v_g/c vs wavelength near ENZ

sim08_panelC_V_vs_S.png.description: V(S) standard vs ENZ-enhanced at 3 wavelengths

probe_parameter_study.png.description: 3-panel: V vs probe FWHM, carrier freq, band width

full_grid_heatmaps.png.description: 2D heatmaps: V(S, lambda_ent) and fringe_spacing(S, lambda_ent)

full_grid_V_vs_lambda.png.description: V vs lambda_ent for selected separations

cat_mode_comparison.png.description: Coherence vs amplitude mode V(S) comparison

key_results.exponential_decay_confirmed: log(V) vs S is linear (confirmed by sim_04)
